## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Added/updated tests for new logic (where applicable)
- [ ] Updated docs (README / docs/) if behavior or setup changed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data added (code, fixtures, or screenshots)
- [ ] API routes go through `getUserClient()` and validate input (if applicable)
